whats_new.title: Jakarta EE 8 full platform support
whats_new.description: WebLogic Server 14.1.2.0.0 provides Jakarta EE 8 full platform support.

whats_new.title: Java SE 17 and 21 certification
whats_new.description: WebLogic Server 14.1.2.0.0 is certified for Java SE 17 and Java SE 21.

whats_new.title: WebLogic Migration Analysis Tool
whats_new.description: WebLogic Server 14.1.2.0.0 adds a command line migration analysis utility that identifies removed or unused APIs in WebLogic applications.

behavior_changes.title: 14c JDK interoperability limitations
behavior_changes.description: Oracle documents interoperability limitations for WebLogic Server 14.1.2.0.0 instances and Java IIOP clients running on JDK 17 or 21.

deprecated.title: Legacy API migration analysis required
deprecated.description: Oracle recommends using migration analysis tooling to identify APIs removed or no longer used in WebLogic Server 14c.
